MODELS: default|chat
USER: Prüfe den Zustand aller Produktionssysteme im Grafana-Monitoring und erstelle einen Incident bei PagerDuty falls kritische Alerts vorliegen

1. TOOL grafana.list_alerts|state=firing
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=no critical alerts
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=system_health_score|period=1h
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_total|period=1h
5. MODEL default|task=assess production health and identify critical issues|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4}
6. TOOL pagerduty.create_incident|title=Critical production alert detected|severity={from_5.severity}|service=production
7. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#ops-critical|message={from_5}
8. DONE

USER: Revisa los tickets abiertos del proyecto GAMMA en Jira, cierra los que llevan más de 30 días sin actividad y envía un informe al jefe de proyecto

1. TOOL jira.list_issues|project=GAMMA|status=open
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=identify issues inactive for 30+ days
3. TOOL jira.update_issue|issue_id={from_2.stale_each}|status=closed|comment=Auto-closed due to 30+ days of inactivity
4. MODEL default|task=create report of closed stale tickets with details and remaining open issues|context={from_1},{from_2}
5. TOOL outlook.send_email|to=project-manager@company.com|subject=Informe GAMMA — Tickets cerrados por inactividad|body={from_4}
6. STORE project|fact=Closed {from_2.stale_count} stale tickets in GAMMA project
7. DONE

USER: The payment service keeps timing out. Investigate, fix if possible, and notify the team

1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod=payment-service|lines=200
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=payment_service_latency_p99|period=2h
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=payment_service_error_rate|period=2h
5. MODEL code-gen|task=analyze logs and metrics to identify timeout root cause|context={from_2},{from_3},{from_4}
6. CHECK {from_5}|expect=actionable root cause identified
7. TOOL k8s.restart_pod|pod=payment-service
8. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#payments-team|message={from_5}
9. STORE project|fact=Payment service timeout investigated and pod restarted
10. DONE

MODELS: default|chat, code-gen|code
USER: Проверь состояние production кластера, собери метрики за последний час, и если есть проблемы — отправь алерт в Slack и подробный отчёт на почту DevOps команде

1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=all pods Running
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=1h
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=cpu_usage|period=1h
5. TOOL grafana.query|metric=memory_usage|period=1h
6. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod={from_1.unhealthy}|lines=300
7. MODEL code-gen|task=analyze cluster health from pods status, metrics and logs|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4},{from_5},{from_6}
8. CHECK {from_7}|expect=health assessment with severity level
9. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#alerts|message=Production alert: {from_7.summary}
10. TOOL outlook.send_email|to=devops-team|subject=Production Health Report|body={from_7}
11. DONE

TOOLS: grafana.query(metric*,period?), grafana.list_alerts(state?), slack.send_message(channel*,message*), pagerduty.create_incident(title*,service*,urgency?)
MODELS: default|chat
USER: Check if any monitoring alerts fired in the last 24h and escalate critical ones to PagerDuty

1. TOOL grafana.list_alerts|state=firing
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=alerts list retrieved
3. EXTRACT critical_alerts|document={from_1}|filter=severity=critical
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=24h
5. MODEL default|task=assess alert severity and compose incident description|context={from_3},{from_4}
6. TOOL pagerduty.create_incident|title={from_5.title}|service=production|urgency=high
7. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#oncall|message={from_5}
8. STORE project|fact=Escalated {from_3.count} critical alerts to PagerDuty
9. DONE

USER: The API gateway has been throwing 502s since the last deploy. Investigate, rollback if needed, and update the team

1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. TOOL grafana.query|metric=http_status_502|period=2h
3. CHECK {from_1}|expect=api-gateway pods in Running state
4. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod={from_1.api-gateway}|lines=200
5. MODEL code-gen|task=analyze logs for root cause of 502 errors|context={from_4},{from_2}
6. CHECK {from_5}|expect=identified root cause
7. TOOL k8s.rollback_deployment|namespace=production|deployment=api-gateway
8. TOOL grafana.query|metric=http_status_502|period=10m
9. CHECK {from_8}|expect=502 rate dropping to zero
10. MODEL default|task=write incident summary with root cause and resolution|context={from_5},{from_8}
11. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#incidents|message={from_10}
12. DONE

1. TOOL github.list_prs|repo=frontend|state=open
2. EXTRACT stale_prs|document={from_1}|filter=created_at older than 5 days
3. CHECK {from_2}|expect=list of stale PRs with authors
4. MODEL default|task=compose friendly reminder messages for each stale PR author|context={from_2}
5. TOOL slack.send_message|channel={from_2.each.author}|message={from_4}
6. TOOL github.add_comment|repo=frontend|pr_number={from_2.each.number}|body=Friendly reminder: this PR has been open for 5+ days
7. DONE

5. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#infra-alerts|message={from_4}
6. STORE ops|fact=CPU check completed, {from_4.count} instances above threshold
7. DONE
